# Valore

> Valore is the fractional brand partner that takes established, owner-led businesses from standard to premium. Founded by Derek Burbidge. Website: https://valore.agency

Valore is not a marketing agency. It is the strategic and accountability layer between a business owner and every surface of their brand. Valore sets the positioning, builds a complete 12-month roadmap, sources and manages the right specialists, and holds everything accountable to one direction. The client and their vendors do the execution. Valore directs and keeps it on course.

## The Brand Ladder

Every Valore engagement is framed as a climb through three stages:
- Standard: good work, competing on price, growing on referrals, invisible to the clients who would happily pay more.
- Premium: chosen for value rather than price, attracting clients who trust the business on sight, earning higher margins that hold their value when the market tightens.
- THE BRAND: the name the market thinks of first, references as the standard, and aspires to work with.

Premium is the goal Valore commits to getting a client to. THE BRAND is the further climb the retainer keeps them on. The roadmap, and every recommendation in it, is built to move the client up this ladder.

## What Valore Does

- Clarifies positioning, messaging, and the ideal client
- Builds a complete 12-month brand roadmap across six dimensions: Identity, Voice, Experience, Visibility, Conversion, and Systems
- Builds visibility online and offline across multiple coordinated channels
- Recommends, briefs, and coordinates the right specialists for each job
- Holds vendors accountable and aligns all marketing activity to one brand direction
- Acts as a fractional brand executive (also called a fractional brand manager or fractional CMO), not a day-to-day executor

## What Valore Does Not Do

- Does not write copy, design, edit video, build websites, or run ads (vendors do the execution; Valore directs)
- Does not run paid ad campaigns as a primary service
- Does not offer one-size-fits-all packages
- Does not work with businesses that want execution without strategy

## Services and Pricing

Every engagement begins with the Sprint. No retainer begins without a Sprint first. Pricing is published and transparent.

### Brand Intelligence Sprint — $4,500, one-time
A focused five-day process that produces a complete 12-month strategic roadmap, deployed live to ClickUp. Includes a full digital audit (website, social, Google Business Profile, SEO, AI search visibility, reputation, and competitive landscape), a structured Brand Intelligence Session, strategic synthesis across the six brand dimensions, vendor recommendations with estimated costs, and a quick-win plan. Delivered within five business days of the session.

### Brand Oversight Retainer — $3,500 per month
For clients who want Valore to stay involved after the Sprint as their fractional brand director. Includes a monthly strategy session, weekly roadmap review and approvals, vendor sourcing and accountability, priority async access, and quarterly recalibration. It does not include production work.

Valore costs a fraction of a full-time marketing manager (typically $80,000 or more in salary alone, well over $100,000 once benefits and overhead are loaded), directs the strategy, and frees the rest of the budget to hire real specialists per job.

## Primary Audience

Established, owner-led businesses generating high six figures to seven figures annually, built on reputation and referrals, ready to match their market presence to the quality of what they deliver. Examples: luxury renovation and custom home builders, high-end interior designers, premium landscape and outdoor-living companies, boutique wellness and aesthetics brands, high-ticket coaches and consultants, specialty trades, and premium professional-service firms. Geography is not a factor; the right client can operate locally, regionally, nationally, or remotely.

## Founder

Derek Burbidge founded Cardero Clothing in 2015 and spent a decade building it into a recognized premium custom menswear brand across the Fraser Valley and Lower Mainland of British Columbia, Canada. He has worked alongside high-end service brands, seven and eight-figure businesses, and owner-led companies at every stage of growth. Valore is built on that experience.

## Core Philosophy

Most businesses rely too heavily on one or two marketing channels. When that channel slows, the business stalls. Strong brands are built through multiple coordinated touchpoints, and through the surfaces most businesses neglect: a consistent visual identity, a clear voice, and a client experience that reflects the quality of the work. Each channel is another leg of the stool. The more legs, the more stable the brand.

## How to Work With Valore

Start the conversation with a 30-minute call: https://cal.com/derek-burbidge-msgkca/30brand

Derek reviews the business, website, reviews, and competitive landscape before every call. The session identifies the gap between where the brand is and where it needs to be. There is no pitch. The client leaves with at least one clear direction, whether or not they go on to work with Valore.

## Free Tools

- Brand Assessment (where your brand stands and what to fix first): https://valore.agency/brand-assessment/
- Marketing Cost Calculator (a marketing manager versus a fractional brand partner): https://valore.agency/marketing-cost-calculator/
- Pricing Readiness Scorecard (whether your brand is ready to charge premium prices): https://valore.agency/pricing-readiness/
